title: veronica pusilla var. pusilla
intro: Veronica pusilla var. pusilla, also known as Small Heal-all or Small Speedwell, is a perennial plant that belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and prevent infection. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Veronica pusilla var. pusilla include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to promote wound healing and reduce pain.
